worker_tools.name: claim_work_key
worker_tools.purpose: Claim a one-time work key/secret with required claimed_by owner identity and bind it to the current worker session.
worker_tools.reconnect_policy: Reconnects are accepted only when the same claimed_by owner presents the same secret proof.

worker_tools.name: get_current_assignment
worker_tools.purpose: Return the scoped assignment for the bound grant.

worker_tools.name: read_context
worker_tools.purpose: Read context.md for the current work package.

worker_tools.name: read_task_plan
worker_tools.purpose: Read task_plan.md for the current work package.

worker_tools.name: update_task_plan
worker_tools.purpose: Patch the plan with optimistic concurrency.

worker_tools.name: append_finding
worker_tools.purpose: Append a finding to the current work package.

worker_tools.name: append_progress
worker_tools.purpose: Append a progress event to the current work package.

worker_tools.name: request_scope_expansion
worker_tools.purpose: Request broader scope; does not approve it.

worker_tools.name: mark_ready
worker_tools.purpose: Move to ready state only if gates pass.
